meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills for High-End Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Master Claude Code and Antigravity to accelerate your freelance workflow and deliver production-grade SaaS solutions faster.
content.answer_block: You are stuck because you are coding manually instead of orchestrating AI. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your workflow from manual scripting to high-level architectural design. This setup automates boilerplate, enforces clean code patterns, and allows you to ship complex, production-ready features in hours, not weeks.
content.intro:
The freelance graveyard is littered with half-baked MVPs that never scaled. You’ve been manually writing boilerplate, battling environment drift, and losing billable hours to tedious debugging. It’s the 'Basic App Trap'—a cycle that keeps your income capped and your projects perpetually unfinished.

But the paradigm has shifted. By leveraging Claude Code for intelligent execution and Antigravity for architectural scaffolding, you stop being a code monkey and become an AI-powered systems architect. This isn't just about faster typing; it's about shifting your focus from syntax to strategy, enabling you to ship enterprise-level features while your competitors are still setting up their dev environments.

steps.title: Initialize the Architectural Foundation
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that enforces modularity from day one, preventing technical debt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a production-ready repository structure for a SaaS app using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Enforce strict TypeScript types and modular directory patterns.

steps.title: Define Domain Models with Semantic Precision
steps.description: Use AI to define your database schema and API interfaces, ensuring consistency across the entire stack.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my requirements for a multi-tenant user authentication system and generate the corresponding Prisma schema and API route handlers.

steps.title: Inject Business Logic via Contextual Agents
steps.description: Automate complex business logic implementation by providing Claude Code with your specific business rules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the subscription billing logic using Stripe webhooks. Ensure idempotency and handle all edge cases for failed payments.

steps.title: Automate Unit and Integration Testing
steps.description: Don't write tests manually; let the AI verify your code against your requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write comprehensive Jest unit tests for the newly created billing service. Include edge case coverage for API rate limits.

steps.title: Deploy with CI/CD Orchestration
steps.description: Streamline your deployment pipeline so code moves from your editor to production with zero friction.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, tests, and deploys to Vercel only on successful merges.

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'system.md' file in your root; Claude Code uses this to understand your project's unique architectural constraints.
Use 'claude config' to set custom system prompts that enforce your specific coding style, such as 'always use functional components'.
Pipe your git diffs directly into Claude Code to get concise, meaningful commit messages that impress clients during review.
Leverage the Antigravity 'knowledge base' feature to store your common boilerplate patterns so you never write the same auth flow twice.
Run 'claude chat' in a separate terminal window to brainstorm architectural pivots before committing to a specific implementation path.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin mapping your current client's project into the Antigravity knowledge base to see how much boilerplate you can eliminate in your next sprint.
content.conversion_block: Stop settling for basic apps and start building high-value, scalable solutions that command premium rates. Your transition to an AI-powered developer begins now. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
